pos_sentences.text: Placement cell is well maintained by providing 100% placement with an average LPA of 4
pos_sentences.name: Ansah M

pos_sentences.text: Good and well developed infrastructure which is moderate camparable to tier 1 colleges
pos_sentences.name: Ansah M

pos_sentences.text: Here we get more exposure to people coming from different corners of india.
pos_sentences.name: Kanthala keerthana

pos_sentences.text: The library is too good. It has good collection of books and e sources availability is wider
pos_sentences.name: Kanthala keerthana

pos_sentences.text: Here we get access to very good phd candidates and good experienced proffessors
pos_sentences.name: Kanthala keerthana

pos_sentences.text: The telescope observatory under Physics department
pos_sentences.name: Abhin Siby

pos_sentences.text: conducting various programs and cultural events in a decent manner.
pos_sentences.name: Uday Krishna N P

pos_sentences.text: enough amount of classrooms and other study materials
pos_sentences.name: Uday Krishna N P

pos_sentences.text: Placements are really good cause you will get minimum of 4 lpa. And coming to course it is better I can say.
pos_sentences.name: Sheru Sravanthi

pos_sentences.text: The internship was a very extensive course. It has observatory and practionary experience
pos_sentences.name: Sanjana Kashyap

neg_sentences.text: Conceptual knowledge less campare to normal colleges or pure science streams
neg_sentences.name: Ansah M

neg_sentences.text: Hostel food is not good ( mandatory to take food if you are staying in hostel)
neg_sentences.name: Ansah M

neg_sentences.text: Library timings is limited.Few books are too outdated and not relevant to cutrent curriculum.
neg_sentences.name: Kanthala keerthana

neg_sentences.text: Sports equipment is not upto the mark and the lab equipments too
neg_sentences.name: Kanthala keerthana

neg_sentences.text: some faculties are not taking classes regularly
neg_sentences.name: Uday Krishna N P

neg_sentences.text: the college is not giving importance to sports.
neg_sentences.name: Uday Krishna N P

neg_sentences.text: I bit dissatisfied with the scholarship and reservation policy. SC ST students mainly of Karnataka people gets more reservation than any other state people.
neg_sentences.name: Sheru Sravanthi

neg_sentences.text: If you have taken BSc MSc Ed integrated course they don't allow you to discontinue anywhere in during the course
neg_sentences.name: Sanjana Kashyap

neg_sentences.text: Poor hostel facilities. Inmates are falling sick, food poisoning cases are being reported
neg_sentences.name: Priya

neg_sentences.text: Some faculties do not conduct internal free and fair..the students are just neglected. If we work hard we succeed but if no we will be the most unsuccessful unproductive people
neg_sentences.name: Priya
